---
title: HTML
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = FALSE
)
```

******************************************************************************************

https://www.w3schools.com/html/default.asp

******************************************************************************************

<`tag` `attribute`="`property`:`value`;">

block-level elements  
`<div>`  
`<h1> - <h6>`  
`<p>`  
`<form>`  
`<header>`  
`<footer>`  
`<section>`  

inline elements  
`<span>`  
`<a>`  
`<img>`
